mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies ( id, title, original_title, overview, poster_path, backdrop_path, release_date, vote_average, vote_count, popularity, original_language, runtime ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{overview}, #{posterPath}, #{backdropPath}, #{releaseDate}, #{voteAverage}, #{voteCount}, #{popularity}, #{originalLanguage}, #{runtime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), original_title = VALUES(original_title), overview = VALUES(overview), poster_path = VALUES(poster_path), backdrop_path = VALUES(backdrop_path), release_date = VALUES(release_date), vote_average = VALUES(vote_average), vote_count = VALUES(vote_count), popularity = VALUES(popularity), original_language = VALUES(original_language), runtime = VALUES(runtime);
